en_title: Xbox Game Exclusivity Will Be Decided on a 'Case-by-Case' Basis, Microsoft Says
subtitle: 逐案定独占
opus_summary: 微软内容官Matt Booty澄清，未来Xbox游戏独占将逐案决定，但大型多人在线和持续运营游戏仍跨平台。已承诺PlayStation的游戏不受影响。

paragraphs.en: Xbox exec Matt Booty has attempted to clarify Microsoft's new position on game exclusivity, following the reveal that Gears of War: E-Day and Clockwork Revolution will never come to PlayStation.
paragraphs.cn: 在《战争机器：事变日》和《发条革命》确认永远不会登陆PlayStation后，Xbox高管Matt Booty试图澄清微软在游戏独占问题上的新立场。

paragraphs.en: Last night's Xbox Showcase featured the return of games specifically earmarked as exclusives for Xbox consoles (though, of course, they'll still also be coming to PC). But why just Gears and Clockwork Revolution? And how will this policy be enforced in future? Microsoft's announcement left numerous questions unanswered.
paragraphs.cn: 昨晚的Xbox展示会上，一些游戏被明确标注为Xbox主机独占（当然，它们仍会登陆PC）。但为什么只有《战争机器》和《发条革命》？未来这项政策将如何执行？微软的公告留下了诸多疑问。

paragraphs.en: Now, chief content officer Booty has stepped forward to shed more light on what will — and won't — be an Xbox exclusive in future. Speaking to Gamertag Radio , Booty said that future decisions would be made on a "case-by-case basis," though all "big multiplayer games and live-service games" will remain multiplatform — as will anything previously confirmed for PlayStation to date.
paragraphs.cn: 如今，首席内容官Booty出面进一步说明了未来哪些游戏会成为Xbox独占、哪些不会。他在接受Gamertag Radio采访时表示，未来的决策将「逐案决定」，但所有「大型多人在线游戏和持续运营游戏」仍将保持跨平台——此前已确认登陆PlayStation的游戏也同样如此。

paragraphs.en: "We want a reason for people to get on board with Xbox, we want them to have a reason to buy an Xbox, we want them to have a reason to be an Xbox fan," Booty said. "At the same time, we want to reward all our players that have been with us for a long time — we know that exclusives are important, and that's why we've got Gears coming in 2026 and Clockwork [Revolution] coming in 2027."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们希望让人们有理由选择Xbox，有理由购买Xbox，有理由成为Xbox粉丝，」Booty说道，「同时，我们也想回馈那些长期支持我们的玩家——我们知道独占很重要，所以《战争机器》将在2026年推出，《发条革命》将在2027年推出。」

paragraphs.en: "We also want to be clear that our big multiplayer games and live-service games are going to continue to be multiplatform," he continued. "If we've promised something to players already, we're going to honor that promise. And then — I think Asha said it — we're going to make the right decision and not the fast decision.
paragraphs.cn: 「我们还想明确一点，我们的大型多人在线游戏和持续运营游戏将继续保持跨平台，」他继续说道，「如果我们已经向玩家做出了承诺，我们就会兑现。然后——我想Asha说过——我们要做出正确的决定，而不是仓促的决定。」

paragraphs.en: "We're going to keep thinking about this going forward," Booty continued, "and, I think you guys know already, our principle is when we announce the date, we announce the platforms. So, it's going to be case-by-case, but we're going to be clear, that when it's got a date, it's got a platform and you'll know what the choice is going to be."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们会继续思考这个问题，」Booty继续说道，「而且，我想你们已经知道，我们的原则是：公布发售日期的同时，也会公布登陆平台。所以，这将逐案决定，但我们会明确说明——一旦有了日期，就有了平台，你们就会知道选择是什么。」

paragraphs.en: Beyond those games already confirmed for PlayStation (such as the upcoming Halo: Campaign Evolved, and the PS5 version of Forza Horizon 6 due later this year), last night saw Microsoft make the call that other upcoming titles would still be coming to PS5 as well. While it had been assumed that State of Decay 3 would get a PS5 version, . Hellblade threequel Senua was unveiled , and is getting a PS5 version. And, unsurprisingly, Spyro: A Realm Beyond is coming to Xbox, PS5 and Nintendo Switch 2.
paragraphs.cn: 除了那些已确认登陆PlayStation的游戏（例如即将推出的《光环：战役进化》，以及今年晚些时候推出的《极限竞速：地平线6》PS5版），昨晚微软还决定其他一些即将推出的游戏也将登陆PS5。虽然此前人们猜测《腐烂国度3》会推出PS5版，但事实并非如此。而《地狱之刃》三部曲的续作《塞娜》也已公布，并将推出PS5版。不出所料，《小龙斯派罗：超越领域》将登陆Xbox、PS5和任天堂Switch 2。

paragraphs.en: What does this all mean for the next full Halo game? Or Elder Scrolls 6, whenever that finally emerges? It's hard to imagine Microsoft giving up the enormous revenue it would see from making its Skyrim sequel a console exclusive, though perhaps it might see value in the next Halo chapter being locked to Xbox, in order to please the brand's legion of fans on social media. As Booty said, fans will just have to wait and see.
paragraphs.cn: 这对下一款正统《光环》游戏意味着什么？或者《上古卷轴6》——无论它最终何时问世？很难想象微软会放弃将《天际》续作作为主机独占所能带来的巨额收入，不过，也许它认为将下一部《光环》锁定在Xbox上有其价值，以取悦该品牌在社交媒体上的大量粉丝。正如Booty所说，粉丝们只能拭目以待。

paragraphs.en: For all of Microsoft's announcements, be sure to catch up with everything announced at the Xbox Showcase 2026 , including our best look yet at Fable and more. Preorders are also now live for Gears of War: E-Day on Xbox, alongside Fable and Halo: Campaign Evolved for Xbox and PS5.
paragraphs.cn: 关于微软的所有公告，请务必了解2026年Xbox展示会上公布的全部内容，包括我们迄今为止对《神鬼寓言》的最佳预览等。《战争机器：事变日》的Xbox版预购现已开启，同时《神鬼寓言》和《光环：战役进化》的Xbox及PS5版预购也已开放。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。你可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或在Bluesky上找到他。
